top_signals.title: Zelenskyy taps European allies to build Freya, a cheaper Patriot-alternative to Russia’s ballistic missiles
top_signals.summary: Ukraine will hold its first coalition meeting on a homegrown ballistic missile defense system in France “in the coming days.”
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Giustra: Copper market needs six new mines a year to 2050
top_signals.summary: Frank Giustra sees looming copper shortages and mounting debt reshaping mining, gold and global capital flows.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Bowman, Opening Remarks on Sound Practices for Artificial Intelligence
top_signals.summary: Speech At the Financial Stability Board Virtual Outreach Event
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Ryuk ransomware member pleads guilty in the US, faces 15 years in prison
top_signals.summary: A 34-year-old Armenian man has pleaded guilty to hacking U.S. companies and deploying the infamous Ryuk ransomware to encrypt their systems. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: CATL takes 20% stake in graphite materials developer CarbonScape
top_signals.summary: Last year, the New Zealand-based company signed several agreements for  supply of renewable feedstock to its future biographite industrial plants in Europe and North America.
